questionText: Provide the amount and proportion of your financial metrics in the reporting year that are aligned with the substantive effects of environmental opportunities.
questionKo: 보고연도의 재무지표 중 환경적 기회의 중대한 영향을 받은 금액과 비율을 입력하십시오 .
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: This question gives insight into your organization's response to environmental opportunities. It provides investors and data users with information on how your organization is positioning its assets, spending, and revenue to take advantage of the opportunities that it has identified.

columns.text: Amount of financial metric aligned with opportunities for this environmental issue (unit currency as selected in 1.2)
columns.textKo: Amount of financial metric aligned with opportunities for this environmental issue (unit currency as 선택 in 1.2)

columns.text: % of total financial metric aligned with opportunities for this environmental issue
columns.textKo: % of total financial metric aligned with opportunities for this environmental issue

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select either of the "Yes" options in response to column "Environmental opportunities identified" in the Climate change, Forests, or Water row of 3.6.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 only appears 만약 you select either 의 "Yes" options in response to 열 "Environmental opportunities identified" in the 기후변화, Forests, 또는 수자원 행 of 3.6.

guidance.text:
General 
While question 3.6.1 asks for the financial effects of opportunities identified per specific opportunities and time horizon, this question enables investors and data users to understand the amount and proportion of your organization's current financial metrics that are aligned to financial effects of all environmental opportunities identified, regardless of when they may occur. 
Options in column 1 "Environmental issue" are dependent on selections in column 1 "Environmental issue" of 3.6.
You should report at least one row for each environmental issue presented in column 1 "Environmental issue", based on the financial metric in column 2 "Financial metric" most relevant to your business. You may choose to add rows to report based on additional financial metrics.
Environmental opportunities with which your organization's finances are aligned may relate to one or more environmental issues. For example, if your organization had anticipated gains in revenue due to increased brand value resulting from water and forest initiatives undertaken, you may include the revenue in the calculation of alignment with both water and forest related opportunities.
Consider the amount and proportion of the financial metric aligned with opportunities which are anticipated to have a substantive effect on the organization in any time horizon. For example, all assets aligned with opportunities in any of the short, medium, or long-term time horizons should be included when calculating column 3 "Amount of total financial metric aligned with opportunities for this environmental issue (unit currency as selected in 1.2)".
Financial metric (column 2) 
Select the financial metric for which you have assessed your organization's alignment to opportunities related to the environmental issue selected in column 1.
If CAPEX is selected, consider the amount and proportion of CAPEX deployed toward environmental opportunities. 
If multiple financial metrics are relevant to depicting your organization's opportunities per environmental issue, you may add rows to report based on additional financial metrics.
You should report the metrics that are most relevant to your business activities.
Amount of financial metric aligned with opportunities for this environmental issue (unit currency as selected in 1.2) (column 3) 
Indicate the amount of the financial metric considered aligned with opportunities relating to this environmental issue. In other words, what is the amount of the financial metric that could take advantage of opportunities relating to this environmental issue. For example:
If an organization in the energy sector puts 5% of their CAPEX in the reporting year into renewables, then that 5% of their CAPEX is aligned with climate change-related opportunities, as that 5% can take advantage of the energy transition.
% of total financial metric aligned with opportunities for this environmental issue (column 4) 
Indicate the proportion of the metric considered aligned with opportunities relating to this environmental issue.
Calculate this number by dividing the figure provided in column 3 "Amount of financial metric aligned with opportunities for this environmental issue (unit currency as selected in 1.2)" by the total value of the selected financial metric.
E.g. If "Climate change" is the environmental issue in column 1 "Environmental issue" and "Revenue" is the financial metric selected in column 2 "Financial metric", divide the value of your revenue aligned with climate change opportunities by your total revenue.
Select the closest range to the calculated % and provide an explanation in column 5 "Explanation of financial figures".
Explanation of financial figures (column 5) 
Describe the methodology used to derive the figures, including;
The approach employed for calculation; and
Any assumptions underlying the figure.
guidance.textKo: 일반 While 문항 3.6.1 asks 에 대한 financial effects of opportunities identified per specific opportunities 및 time horizon, this 문항 enables investors 및 데이터 사용자 to understand the amount 및 proportion of 귀사의 current financial metrics that are aligned to financial effects of all environmental opportunities identified, regardless of 경우 they may occur. Options in 열 1 "Environmental issue" are dependent on selections in 열 1 "Environmental issue" of 3.6. You 해야 합니다 report 최소 one 행 for each environmental issue presented in 열 1 "Environmental issue", based on the financial metric in 열 2 "Financial metric" most relevant to your business. You may choose to add 행 to report based on additional financial metrics. Environmental opportunities with which 귀사의 finances are aligned may relate to one 또는 more environmental issues. For example, 만약 귀사 had anticipated gains in 매출 due to increased brand value resulting from 수자원 및 forest 이니셔티브 undertaken, you may include the 매출 in the calculation of alignment with both 수자원 및 forest related opportunities. Consider the amount 및 proportion 의 financial metric aligned with opportunities which are anticipated to have a substantive effect on the organization in 하나 이상 time horizon. For example, all assets aligned with opportunities in 하나 이상 의 short, medium, 또는 long-term time horizons 해야 합니다 be included 경우 calculating 열 3 "Amount of total financial metric aligned with opportunities for this environmental issue (unit currency as 선택 in 1.2)". Financial metric (열 2) Select the financial metric for which you have assessed 귀사의 alignment to opportunities related to the environmental issue 선택 in 열 1. 만약 자본지출(자본지출(CAPEX)) is 선택, consider the amount 및 proportion of 자본지출(자본지출(CAPEX)) deployed toward environmental opportunities. 만약 multiple financial metrics are relevant to depicting 귀사의 opportunities per environmental issue, you may add 행 to report based on additional financial metrics. You 해야 합니다 report the metrics that are most relevant to your business activities. Amount of financial metric aligned with opportunities for this environmental issue (unit currency as 선택 in 1.2) (열 3) Indicate the amount 의 financial metric considered aligned with opportunities relating to this environmental issue. In other words, what is the amount 의 financial metric that could take advantage of opportunities relating to this environmental issue. For example: 만약 an organization in the energy sector puts 5% 의ir 자본지출(자본지출(CAPEX)) in the 보고연도 into renewables, then that 5% 의ir 자본지출(자본지출(CAPEX)) is aligned with 기후변화-related opportunities, as that 5% can take advantage 의 energy transition. % of total financial metric aligned with opportunities for this environmental issue (열 4) Indicate the proportion 의 metric considered aligned with opportunities relating to this environmental issue. Calculate this number by dividing the figure 입력 in 열 3 "Amount of financial metric aligned with opportunities for this environmental issue (unit currency as 선택 in 1.2)" by the total value 의 선택 financial metric. E.g. 만약 "기후변화" is the environmental issue in 열 1 "Environmental issue" 및 "매출" is the financial metric 선택 in 열 2 "Financial metric", divide the value of your 매출 aligned with 기후변화 opportunities by your total 매출. Select the closest range to the calculated % 및 provide an explanation in 열 5 "Explanation of financial figures". Explanation of financial figures (열 5) 설명 the 방법론 used to derive the figures, 포함; The approach employed for calculation; 및 하나 이상 assumptions underlying the figure.

guidance.text:
The organization discloses organization-wide information, including: 
Amount and proportion of assets and business activities aligned with environmental opportunities.
Amount of expenditure deployed towards opportunities.
guidance.textKo: The organization discloses organization-wide information, 포함: Amount 및 proportion of assets 및 business activities aligned with environmental opportunities. Amount of expenditure deployed towards opportunities.

guidance.text:
Assets: entities functioning as stores of value and over which ownership rights are enforced by institutional units, individually or collectively, and from which economic benefits may be derived by their owners by holding them, or using them, over a period of time (the economic benefits consist of primary incomes derived from the use of the asset and the value, including possible holding gains/losses, that could be realized by disposing of the asset or terminating it).
Capital expenditure: a measure of the value of purchases of fixed assets such as property, buildings, an industrial plant, technology, or equipment. Put differently, CapEx is any type of expense that an organization capitalizes, or shows on its balance sheet as an investment, rather than on its income statement as an expenditure.
Revenue : gross income arising from the operations of an organization over a period of time.
guidance.textKo: Assets: entities functioning as stores of value 및 over which ownership rights are enforced by institutional units, individually 또는 collectively, 및 from which economic benefits may be derived by their owners by holding them, 또는 using them, over a period of time (the economic benefits consist of primary incomes derived from the use 의 asset 및 the value, 포함 possible holding gains/losses, that could be realized by disposing 의 asset 또는 terminating it). 자본지출: a measure 의 value of purchases of fixed assets such as property, buildings, an industrial plant, technology, 또는 equipment. Put differently, 자본지출(자본지출(CAPEX)) is 하나 이상 type of expense that an organization capitalizes, 또는 shows on its balance sheet as an investment, rather than on its income statement as an expenditure. 매출 : gross income arising from the operations of an organization over a period of time.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue':
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed. Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 5/5 points is available for this route.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issue' in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.

sectorTagsKo: 금융 서비스, 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, 시멘트, Food, beverage & tobacco, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: This 문항 gives insight into 귀사의 response to environmental opportunities. It provides investors 및 데이터 사용자 with information on how 귀사 is positioning its assets, spending, 및 매출 to take advantage 의 opportunities that it has identified.
